channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-11216] sanity test_241b: Timeout occurred after 182 mins
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f85b5792-9899-11e8-b0aa-52540065bddc

test_241b failed with the following error:

Timeout occurred after 182 mins, last suite running was sanity, restarting cluster to continue tests

client stack dump log https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_logs/f9d1a478-9899-11e8-b0aa-52540065bddc/show_text shows 'dd' is dead in waiting:

[11081.319124] dd              S ffff98247a37dee0     0  8826   8636 0x00000080
[11081.319884] Call Trace:
[11081.320186]  [<ffffffff9c513fe9>] schedule+0x29/0x70
[11081.320662]  [<ffffffff9c511894>] schedule_timeout+0x174/0x2c0
[11081.321235]  [<ffffffff9bea3750>] ? internal_add_timer+0x70/0x70
[11081.321930]  [<ffffffffc0b1e6a0>] ? ptlrpc_init_rq_pool+0x110/0x110 [ptlrpc]
[11081.322628]  [<ffffffffc0b28400>] ptlrpc_set_wait+0x480/0x790 [ptlrpc]
[11081.323274]  [<ffffffff9becf670>] ? wake_up_state+0x20/0x20
[11081.323911]  [<ffffffffc0b2878d>] ptlrpc_queue_wait+0x7d/0x220 [ptlrpc]
[11081.324557]  [<ffffffffc0b0d6f2>] ldlm_cli_enqueue+0x3d2/0x920 [ptlrpc]
[11081.325213]  [<ffffffffc0b087f0>] ? ldlm_expired_completion_wait+0x220/0x220 [ptlrpc]
[11081.326082]  [<ffffffffc0cfe4e0>] ? osc_lock_lockless_cancel+0xe0/0xe0 [osc]
[11081.326781]  [<ffffffffc0cfd8a0>] ? osc_lock_upcall+0x580/0x580 [osc]
[11081.327420]  [<ffffffffc0cf4965>] osc_enqueue_base+0x2b5/0x6a0 [osc]
[11081.328141]  [<ffffffffc0cfd320>] ? osc_lock_lvb_update+0x330/0x330 [osc]
[11081.328781]  [<ffffffffc0cfef4b>] osc_lock_enqueue+0x38b/0x840 [osc]
[11081.329404]  [<ffffffffc0cfd320>] ? osc_lock_lvb_update+0x330/0x330 [osc]
[11081.330155]  [<ffffffffc095f395>] cl_lock_enqueue+0x65/0x120 [obdclass]
[11081.330824]  [<ffffffffc0d58285>] lov_lock_enqueue+0x95/0x150 [lov]
[11081.331453]  [<ffffffffc095f395>] cl_lock_enqueue+0x65/0x120 [obdclass]
[11081.332170]  [<ffffffffc095f927>] cl_lock_request+0x67/0x1f0 [obdclass]
[11081.332819]  [<ffffffffc096381b>] cl_io_lock+0x2bb/0x3d0 [obdclass]
[11081.333453]  [<ffffffffc0963bab>] cl_io_loop+0x11b/0xc70 [obdclass]
[11081.334219]  [<ffffffffc0db1fe2>] ll_file_io_generic+0x4e2/0xd10 [lustre]
[11081.334878]  [<ffffffff9bfc7c3d>] ? handle_mm_fault+0x39d/0x9b0
[11081.335549]  [<ffffffffc0db2d62>] ll_file_aio_write+0x372/0x550 [lustre]
[11081.336214]  [<ffffffffc0db2fe4>] ll_file_write+0xa4/0x170 [lustre]
[11081.336875]  [<ffffffff9c01b490>] vfs_write+0xc0/0x1f0
[11081.337375]  [<ffffffff9c5206e1>] ? system_call_after_swapgs+0xae/0x146
[11081.338008]  [<ffffffff9c01c2bf>] SyS_write+0x7f/0xf0
[11081.338559]  [<ffffffff9c5206e1>] ? system_call_after_swapgs+0xae/0x146
[11081.339208]  [<ffffffff9c520795>] system_call_fastpath+0x1c/0x21
[11081.339828]  [<ffffffff9c5206e1>] ? system_call_after_swapgs+0xae/0x146

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_241b - Timeout occurred after 182 mins, last suite running was sanity, restarting cluster to continue tests
item.summary: sanity test_241b: Timeout occurred after 182 mins

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
